'''''Nihil''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

During the vengeful offensive after the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]], ''Nihil'' destroyed the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
